title: Smoky Roasted Croatian Lentil Gratin
description: A creamy, smoky lentil gratin packed with roasted tomatoes, caramelized onions, and a cashew‑nutritional‑yeast crust, perfect for a hearty plant‑based dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tbsp olive oil over medium heat and sauté the diced onion until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic, smoked paprika, and oregano to the onions; cook for another 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the halved cherry tomatoes and cook until they begin to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the rinsed lentils and vegetable broth to the skillet, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes, or until lentils are tender.
Season the lentil mixture with salt and pepper.
Transfer the lentil mixture to a baking dish, spreading it evenly.
In a small bowl, whisk together the cashew cream and nutritional yeast; drizzle over the lentils.
Top with panko breadcrumbs and the remaining 2 tbsp olive oil.
Bake uncovered for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden and the gratin has set.
